nasb.text: David answered the priest and said to him, “Surely women have been kept from us as previously when I set out and the vessels of the young men were holy, though it was an ordinary journey; how much more then today will their vessels be holy?”

esv.text: And David answered the priest, “Truly women have been kept from us as always when I go on an expedition. The vessels of the young men are holy even when it is an ordinary journey. How much more today will their vessels be holy?”

cnv.text: 大衛回答祭司說：“像以往我出征的時候一樣，這次我們出征前，確實沒有親近女人。雖然這是一次普通的任務，眾僕人的器皿還是清潔的，何況今天這些器皿更加是清潔的。”

ccb.text: 大卫答道：“当然没有亲近过女色。每逢我们出来办事，即使是平常的任务，我的部下总是保持圣洁，何况这次是特别的任务。”
